# Mycelium - Collective Knowledge Infrastructure

> Automatic knowledge sharing for AI agents. Problems solved once are solved for everyone.

## What It Does

Agents solve problems. Mycelium extracts the knowledge into structured skills (SKILL.md files), stores them in a SQLite database with embeddings, and injects relevant skills into future agent sessions — automatically.

## Status

Active development. 11 packages, 373 tests, ~17K lines of Go. Extraction pipeline complete and tested.

## Architecture

Four subsystems: Extraction → Storage → Injection → Decay.

### Extraction Pipeline (internal/extraction/)
3-stage filter:
- Stage 1: Metadata pre-filter (duration 2-180min, tool calls ≥3, error rate ≤70%, successful exec). No I/O.
- Stage 2: Embedding novelty (cosine distance in [0.15, 0.95]) + LLM rubric scoring (7 dimensions, 1-5 each). Must meet MinimumViable: ProblemSpecificity ≥3, SolutionCompleteness ≥3, TechnicalAccuracy ≥3.
- Stage 3: LLM critic with retry (exponential backoff, max 3-5 retries), circuit breaker (opens after 5 failures, 5min cooldown), content truncation at 100KB, contradiction detection.

Key interfaces: Extractor, Stage1Filter, Stage2Scorer, Stage3Critic, LLMClient, SkillQuerier, SkillEmbedder, SkillWriter, SessionWriter, HumanReviewWriter.

Human review: stratified 50/50 sampling at configurable rate (default 1%).

### Storage (internal/storage/)
SQLite with WAL mode. Tables: skills, skill_patterns, skill_embeddings, sessions, injection_events, human_review_samples.
Query ranking: 0.5×PatternOverlap + 0.3×CosineSim + 0.2×HistoricalRate.
Bulk-loads patterns and embeddings (no N+1).

### Injection (internal/injection/)
Steps: LLM prompt classification → embedding → skill store query → re-rank → limit (default 3).
Degraded mode (no embeddings): 0.7×PatternOverlap + 0.3×HistoricalRate.
ABInjector decorator: treatment (skills delivered) vs control (skills withheld, events logged with delivered=false).

### Decay (internal/decay/)
Half-life: foundational=365d, tactical=90d, contextual=180d.
Formula: newDecay = oldDecay × 0.5^(days/halfLife).
Rescue: skills injected within 30d with positive success correlation get +0.3 boost.
Deprecation threshold: 0.05 → set to 0.0.

### Metrics (internal/metrics/)
Collects: stage pass rates, extraction yield, injection rate, skill utilization, quality averages, decay distribution, A/B z-test with p-value.

## CLI Commands

- `mycelium init` — Create workspace at ~/.mycelium/
- `mycelium serve` — Start SSH git server with extraction + injection hooks
- `mycelium extract <session-log>` — Run extraction pipeline (flags: --config, --library)
- `mycelium decay` — Run decay cycle (flags: --config, --library, --dry-run)
- `mycelium stats` — Print pipeline metrics (flags: --config)
- `mycelium --version` — Show version
- `mycelium help` — Show help

Exit codes: 0=success, 1=error, 2=extraction rejected, 3=extraction error.

## SKILL.md Format

```yaml
---
name: kebab-case-name
id: uuid-v7
version: 1
category: foundational|tactical|contextual
patterns:
  - BUILD/Backend/APIDesign
extracted_by: pipeline-v1
quality: 3.45
confidence: 0.82
source_session: session-uuid
created: 2026-02-15
---

# Title

## When to Use
## Solution
## Why It Works
## Pitfalls
```

## Configuration (~/.mycelium/config.yaml)

```yaml
server:
  host: "127.0.0.1"
  port: 23231
  dataDir: ~/.mycelium/data

storage:
  driver: sqlite
  dsn: ~/.mycelium/mycelium.db

libraries:
  - name: local
    path: ~/.mycelium/skills
    priority: 100

extraction:
  auto_extract: true
  min_confidence: 0.5
  require_validation: true
  min_duration_minutes: 2
  max_duration_minutes: 180
  min_tool_calls: 3
  max_error_rate: 0.7
  novelty_min_distance: 0.15
  novelty_max_distance: 0.95
  version_similarity_threshold: 0.85
  sample_rate: 0.01
  ab_test:
    enabled: false
    control_ratio: 0.1
    min_sample_size: 100

decay:
  foundational_half_life_days: 365
  tactical_half_life_days: 90
  contextual_half_life_days: 180
  deprecation_threshold: 0.05
  rescue_boost: 0.3
  rescue_window_days: 30

embedding:
  provider: openai
  model: text-embedding-3-small

llm:
  model: gpt-4o-mini

hooks:
  credential_scan: true
  format_validation: true
  llm_critic: false

defaults:
  author: ""
  confidence: 0.7
```

## Environment Variables

- OPENAI_API_KEY — fallback for embeddings and LLM
- MYCELIUM_EMBEDDING_API_KEY — embedding API key (overrides OPENAI_API_KEY)
- MYCELIUM_LLM_API_KEY — LLM API key (overrides OPENAI_API_KEY)

## Key Paths

- Config: ~/.mycelium/config.yaml
- Skills: ~/.mycelium/skills/ (git repo)
- Database: ~/.mycelium/mycelium.db (SQLite)
- Server data: ~/.mycelium/data/

## Problem Pattern Taxonomy (20 patterns)

BUILD/Frontend/ComponentDesign, BUILD/Frontend/StateManagement, BUILD/Backend/APIDesign, BUILD/Backend/DataModeling, BUILD/DevOps/CIPipeline, BUILD/DevOps/ContainerSetup, FIX/Frontend/RenderingBug, FIX/Backend/DatabaseConnection, FIX/Backend/AuthFlow, FIX/DevOps/DeploymentFailure, FIX/Performance/MemoryLeak, FIX/Performance/SlowQuery, OPTIMIZE/Performance/Caching, OPTIMIZE/Performance/BundleSize, OPTIMIZE/Backend/QueryOptimization, INTEGRATE/Backend/ThirdPartyAPI, INTEGRATE/DevOps/CloudService, CONFIGURE/DevOps/InfraAsCode, CONFIGURE/Security/AccessControl, LEARN/Data/DataPipeline

## Quality Dimensions (each 1-5)

ProblemSpecificity, SolutionCompleteness, ContextPortability, ReasoningTransparency, TechnicalAccuracy, VerificationEvidence, InnovationLevel.
Composite weights: 0.15, 0.20, 0.15, 0.10, 0.20, 0.10, 0.10.

## Requirements

Go 1.24+, Git, SSH client, OpenAI API key (for extraction/injection).
